get.description:
Check system health and report bot restoration status.
Returns restoration_status: idle, in_progress, completed, failed

schema.title: Response List Users Admin Users Get

get.description:
Effective coin universe for Hyperliquid price ingest and (when mirrored) cache-sidecar.

Resolution order: persisted file → ``HL_SYNC_PAIRS`` → env ``COINS`` / ``COINS_QUOTE``.

put.description:
Persist supported base symbols; written to ``PRICE_DATA_DIR/_gamma_supported_coins.json``
and mirrored under ``LOCAL_CACHE_DIR`` when set.

Subsequent ingest / startup sync uses this list until deleted or overridden by request body.

delete.description: Remove persisted file(s); ingest falls back to env ``COINS`` / ``HL_SYNC_PAIRS``.

post.description:
Run incremental OHLCV (1m snapshot + resample) and funding merge into
``PRICE_DATA_DIR/hyperliquid`` (Freqtrade feather layout).

Heavy work runs in a thread pool to avoid blocking the event loop.

schema.title: Response List Connections Exchange Connections Get
Response List Bots Bot List Get

get.description: Get recent log entries for a bot.

post.description:
Manually sync bot database status with actual process status.
This fixes mismatches like when UI shows running but database shows error.

Rules:
- If process is running: set status to "running"
- If process is not running and status is "running": keep "running" but update error_message
- Otherwise: keep current status

Restore bot data from S3 to local storage.
Useful when starting a fresh container without local bot data.

patch.description: Update bot config with new payload. Accepts same structure as BotCreate.

post.description: Send a test signal to the WebSocket listener for debugging. Requires an active WS connection.

Create both a bot instance and its linked strategy in a single atomic operation. Either both records are created and all files written, or neither is — no partial state. 

Old endpoints (`/bot/create`, `/strategy/create`) remain available for backward compatibility.

patch.description: Update bot configuration and/or strategy in a single atomic operation. Omit any field to leave it unchanged. If ``strategy_configurations`` is provided, the strategy ``.py`` file is regenerated and relevant settings are synced back to the bot's config.json.

schema.title: Response List Bot Orders Orders  Bot Id  Get

post.description:
Receive webhook notification from Freqtrade and broadcast to WebSocket clients.

**Important**: Configure Freqtrade webhook URL as:
`https://your-api.com/api/webhook/bot/{bot_id}?token={optional_webhook_token}`

Event Types:
- `buy` — Trade entry (open long/short position)
- `sell` — Trade exit (close position, profit/loss realized)
- `buy_cancel` — Entry order cancelled
- `sell_cancel` — Exit order cancelled
- `protection_trigger` — Stop-loss or protection triggered

Returns:
    {'status': 'ok', 'message': 'Signal broadcasted'} on success

schema.title: Response Receive Freqtrade Webhook Webhook  Bot Id  Post

get.description: Get active WebSocket connection status for a bot.
Get all bots with active WebSocket connections for current user.

get.summary: WebSocket connection info for bot signal stream
get.description:
Returns the WebSocket URL and connection instructions for real-time bot signal streaming.

**Note:** The actual connection is via WebSocket (`ws://` or `wss://`), not HTTP.
Swagger UI cannot open WebSocket connections — use the URL returned here.

---

**How to connect:**

```
ws://HOST/api/ws/bot/{bot_id}?token=<YOUR_JWT_TOKEN>
```

**Requirements:**
- Bot must be **running** before connecting
- Only **one client** can listen to a bot at a time

**Signal types received:**
- `trade_entry` — new trade opened
- `trade_exit` — trade closed
- `status_change` — bot status changed
- `custom_signal` — custom strategy signal

**Example (JavaScript):**
```js
const ws = new WebSocket(`ws://localhost:8000/api/ws/bot/${botId}?token=${token}`);
ws.onmessage = (e) => console.log(JSON.parse(e.data));
```

**Example (Python):**
```python
import asyncio, websockets, json

async def listen():
    uri = f"ws://localhost:8000/api/ws/bot/{bot_id}?token=<TOKEN>"
    async with websockets.connect(uri) as ws:
        async for msg in ws:
            print(json.loads(msg))

asyncio.run(listen())
```

**CLI (wscat):**
```bash
wscat -c "ws://localhost:8000/api/ws/bot/{bot_id}?token=<TOKEN>"
```

**Error codes:**
- `4000` — Bot is not running
- `4001` — Bot already has an active listener
- `4008` — Auth failed or bot not found

200.description: WebSocket URL and instructions for connecting to bot signal stream

bot_id.title: Bot Id
bot_id.description: Bot instance ID to use for backtesting

BacktestRequest.title: BacktestRequest
BacktestRequest.description: Request schema for starting a backtest

bot_name.title: Bot Name
bot_name.description: Bot name (ignored in updates, included for compatibility)

pair.title: Pair
pair.description: Single trading pair (converted to pairs list)

pairs.title: Pairs
pairs.description: List of trading pairs OR single pair as string

optional.description: Nested optional parameters (same as BotCreate structure)

BotConfigUpdate.title: BotConfigUpdate
BotConfigUpdate.description:
Schema for PATCH /bot/{id}/config.
Accepts the same structure as BotCreate but with ALL fields optional.
This allows sending either flat parameters OR using the nested 'optional' structure.

strategy_name.title: Strategy Name
strategy_name.description: Class name of the strategy inside user_data/strategies/.

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: True = paper trading only; False = live trading with real funds.

exchange_name.title: Exchange Name
exchange_name.description: Exchange ID as recognised by CCXT (e.g. binance, bybit, hyperliquid).

stake_currency.title: Stake Currency
stake_currency.description: Quote currency used for all trades (e.g. USDT, USDC).

stake_amount.title: Stake Amount
stake_amount.description: Amount of stake_currency per trade, or 'unlimited'.

max_open_trades.title: Max Open Trades
max_open_trades.description: Maximum number of simultaneously open trades. -1 = unlimited.

timeframe.title: Timeframe
timeframe.description: Candle timeframe the strategy operates on.

pairs.title: Pairs
pairs.description: Whitelist of trading pairs (BASE/QUOTE format). Replaces exchange.pair_whitelist.

dry_run_wallet.title: Dry Run Wallet
dry_run_wallet.description: Simulated wallet balance used in dry-run mode. Default: 1000.

tradable_balance_ratio.title: Tradable Balance Ratio
tradable_balance_ratio.description: Fraction of total balance the bot is allowed to use. Keep slightly below 1.0 to reserve funds for fees. Default: 1.0.

available_capital.title: Available Capital
available_capital.description: Hard cap on total capital (in stake currency) available to this bot. Useful when running multiple bots on the same account. Default: None (use full balance).

amend_last_stake_amount.title: Amend Last Stake Amount
amend_last_stake_amount.description: Allow the bot to reduce the last stake amount so the trade fits within the remaining balance. Default: False.

last_stake_amount_min_ratio.title: Last Stake Amount Min Ratio
last_stake_amount_min_ratio.description: Minimum ratio of the configured stake amount that the amended last stake must meet. Only relevant when amend_last_stake_amount=True. Default: 0.5.

fiat_display_currency.title: Fiat Display Currency
fiat_display_currency.description: Fiat currency used to display profit/loss values. Default: USD.

stoploss.title: Stoploss
stoploss.description: Stop-loss ratio as a negative number, e.g. -0.10 for 10% loss. Exclusive maximum of 0. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_stop.title: Trailing Stop
trailing_stop.description: Enable trailing stop-loss. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_stop_positive.title: Trailing Stop Positive
trailing_stop_positive.description: Trailing stop offset once in profit (0–1). E.g. 0.02 activates a tighter 2% trailing stop. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_stop_positive_offset.title: Trailing Stop Positive Offset
trailing_stop_positive_offset.description: Minimum profit ratio required before trailing_stop_positive activates. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_only_offset_is_reached.title: Trailing Only Offset Is Reached
trailing_only_offset_is_reached.description: When True, the trailing stop only activates after trailing_stop_positive_offset is reached. Usually defined in the strategy.

minimal_roi.title: Minimal Roi
minimal_roi.description: Minimum ROI targets keyed by minutes elapsed, e.g. {"0": 0.10, "30": 0.05, "60": 0.01}. Usually defined in the strategy.

use_exit_signal.title: Use Exit Signal
use_exit_signal.description: Use the strategy's exit signal. Usually defined in the strategy.

exit_profit_only.title: Exit Profit Only
exit_profit_only.description: Ignore exit signals while the trade is at a loss. Usually defined in the strategy.

exit_profit_offset.title: Exit Profit Offset
exit_profit_offset.description: Minimum profit ratio required before an exit signal is acted upon (requires exit_profit_only=True). Usually defined in the strategy.

ignore_roi_if_entry_signal.title: Ignore Roi If Entry Signal
ignore_roi_if_entry_signal.description: Don't exit based on ROI while a new entry signal is present. Usually defined in the strategy.

ignore_buying_expired_candle_after.title: Ignore Buying Expired Candle After
ignore_buying_expired_candle_after.description: Seconds after a candle close during which a stale entry signal is ignored. Usually defined in the strategy.

trading_mode.title: Trading Mode
trading_mode.description: Market type: spot, margin, or futures. Default: spot.

margin_mode.title: Margin Mode
margin_mode.description: Required when trading_mode=futures or trading_mode=margin. Values: cross, isolated.

liquidation_buffer.title: Liquidation Buffer
liquidation_buffer.description: Safety buffer ratio away from liquidation price (futures only). Range: 0.0–1.0.

leverage.title: Leverage
leverage.description: Leverage multiplier for futures/margin trading (1–125). Default: 1. Futures only.

can_short.title: Can Short
can_short.description: Allow short positions (sell first, buy later) in futures trading. Default: True for futures, False for spot.

position_adjustment_enable.title: Position Adjustment Enable
position_adjustment_enable.description: Enable position adjustment (dollar-cost averaging). Usually defined in the strategy.

max_entry_position_adjustment.title: Max Entry Position Adjustment
max_entry_position_adjustment.description: Maximum number of additional entries per trade. -1 for unlimited. Usually defined in the strategy.

cancel_open_orders_on_exit.title: Cancel Open Orders On Exit
cancel_open_orders_on_exit.description: Cancel all open orders when the bot is stopped. Default: False.

process_only_new_candles.title: Process Only New Candles
process_only_new_candles.description: Run the strategy only on new candles (skip already-seen candles). Saves CPU on slow strategies.

force_entry_enable.title: Force Entry Enable
force_entry_enable.description: Allow force-entry via Telegram or API.

unfilledtimeout.description: Cancel unfilled entry/exit orders after the specified timeout.

entry_pricing.description: Entry price selection strategy (order-book vs last price).

exit_pricing.description: Exit price selection strategy (order-book vs last price).

custom_price_max_distance_ratio.title: Custom Price Max Distance Ratio
custom_price_max_distance_ratio.description: Maximum allowed relative distance between the current price and a custom entry/exit price. Default: 0.02 (2%).

order_types.description: Map trade actions (entry, exit, stoploss) to order types. Usually defined in the strategy.

order_time_in_force.description: Time-in-force for entry and exit orders. Usually defined in the strategy.

pairlists.title: Pairlists
pairlists.description: List of pairlist methods applied in order. Defaults to StaticPairList when not provided.

telegram.description: Telegram bot integration for trade notifications and control.

discord.description: Discord webhook integration for trade notifications.

webhook.description: Generic HTTP webhook integration for trade notifications.

freqai.description: FreqAI machine learning configuration. Enables automated training and retraining of ML models for market prediction based on custom indicators and features.

initial_state.title: Initial State
initial_state.description: Bot state on startup: running, paused, or stopped. Default: running.

fee.title: Fee
fee.description: Override exchange fee (0–0.1). Useful for backtesting to simulate slippage.

export.title: Export
export.description: What to export after backtesting: none, trades, or signals. Default: trades.

db_url.title: Db Url
db_url.description: SQLAlchemy database URL. Defaults to sqlite:///tradesv3.sqlite (live) or sqlite:///tradesv3.dryrun.sqlite (dry-run).

disable_dataframe_checks.title: Disable Dataframe Checks
disable_dataframe_checks.description: Disable indicator column length/NaN validation. Use with caution.

process_throttle_secs.title: Process Throttle Secs
process_throttle_secs.description: Minimum seconds per bot iteration loop. Increase to reduce CPU usage.

config_overrides.title: Config Overrides
config_overrides.description: Raw key-value pairs merged into the generated freqtrade config last, allowing any undocumented or advanced setting to be passed through.

BotCreateOptional.title: BotCreateOptional
BotCreateOptional.description:
All optional freqtrade configuration parameters.

Fields left as None will be omitted from the generated config unless
freqtrade requires them; sensible defaults are documented in each field.

Note: This schema is also reused for PATCH /bot/{id}/config updates,
where all fields (including core ones) are optional.

bot_name.title: Bot Name
bot_name.description: Human-readable name for this bot instance.

exchange_name.title: Exchange Name
exchange_name.description: Exchange ID as recognised by CCXT (e.g. binance, bybit, hyperliquid).

exchange.title: Exchange
exchange.description: Legacy full exchange config object. Exchange-specific fields override individual defaults.

strategy_name.title: Strategy Name
strategy_name.description: Class name of the strategy inside user_data/strategies/.

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: True = paper trading only; False = live trading with real funds.

stake_currency.title: Stake Currency
stake_currency.description: Quote currency used for all trades (e.g. USDT, USDC).

stake_amount.title: Stake Amount
stake_amount.description: Amount of stake_currency per trade, or 'unlimited' to use the full available balance split evenly across max_open_trades.

max_open_trades.title: Max Open Trades
max_open_trades.description: Maximum number of simultaneously open trades. -1 = unlimited.

timeframe.title: Timeframe
timeframe.description: Candle timeframe the strategy operates on.

pair.title: Pair
pair.description: Single trading pair in BASE/QUOTE format (e.g. BTC/USDT). Converted to a list internally.

dry_run_wallet.title: Dry Run Wallet
dry_run_wallet.description: Simulated wallet balance used in dry-run mode. Default: 1000.

fiat_display_currency.title: Fiat Display Currency
fiat_display_currency.description: Fiat currency used to display profit/loss values. Default: USD.

stoploss.title: Stoploss
stoploss.description: Stop-loss ratio as a negative number, e.g. -0.10 for 10% loss. Exclusive maximum of 0. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_stop.title: Trailing Stop
trailing_stop.description: Enable trailing stop-loss. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_stop_positive.title: Trailing Stop Positive
trailing_stop_positive.description: Trailing stop offset once in profit (0–1). E.g. 0.02 activates a tighter 2% trailing stop. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_stop_positive_offset.title: Trailing Stop Positive Offset
trailing_stop_positive_offset.description: Minimum profit ratio required before trailing_stop_positive activates. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_only_offset_is_reached.title: Trailing Only Offset Is Reached
trailing_only_offset_is_reached.description: When True, the trailing stop only activates after trailing_stop_positive_offset is reached. Usually defined in the strategy.

minimal_roi.title: Minimal Roi
minimal_roi.description: Minimum ROI targets keyed by minutes elapsed, e.g. {"0": 0.10, "30": 0.05, "60": 0.01}. Usually defined in the strategy.

use_exit_signal.title: Use Exit Signal
use_exit_signal.description: Use the strategy's exit signal. Usually defined in the strategy.

exit_profit_only.title: Exit Profit Only
exit_profit_only.description: Ignore exit signals while the trade is at a loss. Usually defined in the strategy.

exit_profit_offset.title: Exit Profit Offset
exit_profit_offset.description: Minimum profit ratio required before an exit signal is acted upon (requires exit_profit_only=True). Usually defined in the strategy.

ignore_roi_if_entry_signal.title: Ignore Roi If Entry Signal
ignore_roi_if_entry_signal.description: Don't exit based on ROI while a new entry signal is present. Usually defined in the strategy.

ignore_buying_expired_candle_after.title: Ignore Buying Expired Candle After
ignore_buying_expired_candle_after.description: Seconds after a candle close during which a stale entry signal is ignored. Usually defined in the strategy.

trading_mode.title: Trading Mode
trading_mode.description: Market type: spot, margin, or futures. Default: spot.

margin_mode.title: Margin Mode
margin_mode.description: Required when trading_mode=futures or trading_mode=margin. Values: cross, isolated.

liquidation_buffer.title: Liquidation Buffer
liquidation_buffer.description: Safety buffer ratio away from liquidation price (futures only). Range: 0.0–1.0.

leverage.title: Leverage
leverage.description: Leverage multiplier for futures/margin trading (1–125). Default: 1. Futures only.

can_short.title: Can Short
can_short.description: Allow short positions in futures trading. Default: True for futures, False for spot.

position_adjustment_enable.title: Position Adjustment Enable
position_adjustment_enable.description: Enable position adjustment (dollar-cost averaging). Usually defined in the strategy.

max_entry_position_adjustment.title: Max Entry Position Adjustment
max_entry_position_adjustment.description: Maximum number of additional entries per trade. -1 for unlimited. Usually defined in the strategy.

cancel_open_orders_on_exit.title: Cancel Open Orders On Exit
cancel_open_orders_on_exit.description: Cancel all open orders when the bot is stopped. Default: False.

process_only_new_candles.title: Process Only New Candles
process_only_new_candles.description: Run the strategy only on new candles (skip already-seen candles). Saves CPU on slow strategies.

force_entry_enable.title: Force Entry Enable
force_entry_enable.description: Allow force-entry via Telegram or API.

unfilledtimeout.description: Cancel unfilled entry/exit orders after the specified timeout.

entry_pricing.description: Entry price selection strategy (order-book vs last price).

exit_pricing.description: Exit price selection strategy (order-book vs last price).

order_types.description: Map trade actions (entry, exit, stoploss) to order types. Usually defined in the strategy.

order_time_in_force.description: Time-in-force for entry and exit orders. Usually defined in the strategy.

telegram.description: Telegram bot integration for trade notifications and control.

freqai.description: FreqAI machine learning configuration. Enables automated training and retraining of ML models for market prediction based on custom indicators and features.

process_throttle_secs.title: Process Throttle Secs
process_throttle_secs.description: Minimum seconds per bot iteration loop. Increase to reduce CPU usage.

BotCreateUI.title: BotCreateUI
BotCreateUI.description:
Bot creation schema for the UI/API.

Required fields must always be provided.
Optional fields default to None — remove any you don't want shown in ReDoc.
The service layer applies sensible defaults for all missing optional fields.

BotStrategyOut.title: BotStrategyOut

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable order-book depth check before entry.

bids_to_ask_delta.title: Bids To Ask Delta
bids_to_ask_delta.description: Minimum bids/asks ratio to allow entry.

duration_enabled.title: Duration Enabled
duration_enabled.description: Exit after a fixed amount of time / candles.

duration_value.title: Duration Value
duration_value.description: How long to hold before triggering the duration exit.

duration_unit.title: Duration Unit
duration_unit.description: Unit for duration_value: hours, days, or candles.

profit_ratio_enabled.title: Profit Ratio Enabled
profit_ratio_enabled.description: Exit when profit reaches a multiple of the stop-loss distance (R:R).

profit_ratio.title: Profit Ratio
profit_ratio.description: Target reward-to-risk ratio, e.g. 2.0 = 2× the risk before stopping.

max_duration_enabled.title: Max Duration Enabled
max_duration_enabled.description: Force-exit after the maximum allowed trade duration.

max_duration_value.title: Max Duration Value
max_duration_value.description: Maximum trade duration before forced exit.

max_duration_unit.title: Max Duration Unit
max_duration_unit.description: Unit for max_duration_value: hours, days, or candles.

time_window_enabled.title: Time Window Enabled
time_window_enabled.description: Exit only during a specific time window each day.

time_start.title: Time Start
time_start.description: Start of the daily exit window in HH:MM format (UTC), e.g. "23:00".

time_end.title: Time End
time_end.description: End of the daily exit window in HH:MM format (UTC), e.g. "23:59".

partial_enabled.title: Partial Enabled
partial_enabled.description: Enable partial exits at multiple profit levels via adjust_trade_position(). Requires position_adjustment_enable=True in the bot config.

partial_levels.title: Partial Levels
partial_levels.description: Profit/amount pairs defining each partial exit step.

CustomExitConfig.title: CustomExitConfig
CustomExitConfig.description:
Custom exit logic injected into custom_exit() and adjust_trade_position().
All rules are optional and additive.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Percentage of remaining stake to close at this level (e.g. 50 = 50%).

name.title: Name
name.description: Column name assigned to this indicator in the DataFrame.

source_type.title: Source Type
source_type.description: Whether the source is an OHLCV field or an existing indicator column.

source_col.title: Source Col
source_col.description: Pre-resolved dataframe column key to use as the source. Required when source_type='indicator'. For ohlcv it mirrors source_field.

source_field.title: Source Field
source_field.description: OHLCV field name (open/high/low/close/volume) when source_type='ohlcv', or the indicator column key when source_type='indicator'.

source_timeframe.title: Source Timeframe
source_timeframe.description: When set, data from this informative timeframe is used instead of the current one. Freqtrade exposes it as field_timeframe, e.g. 'low_1h'.

period.title: Period
period.description: Rolling window / shift offset / lookback periods.

CustomIndicatorItem.title: CustomIndicatorItem
CustomIndicatorItem.description:
Custom derived indicator computed before regular TA indicators.
Supports two source modes:
- 'ohlcv': raw candlestick field (open/high/low/close/volume)
- 'indicator': an already-computed indicator column in the dataframe

DiscordConfig.title: DiscordConfig
DiscordConfig.description: Discord webhook integration for trade notifications (freqtrade: discord).

price_side.title: Price Side
price_side.description: Which order-book side to use: ask, bid, same, other.

use_order_book.title: Use Order Book
use_order_book.description: Use order-book for entry price calculation.

order_book_top.title: Order Book Top
order_book_top.description: Top N levels of the order book to consider.

price_last_balance.title: Price Last Balance
price_last_balance.description: Interpolation ratio between order-book and last price.

check_depth_of_market.description: Optional order-book depth guard before entry.

EntryPricingConfig.title: EntryPricingConfig
EntryPricingConfig.description: Controls how the bot picks the entry price (freqtrade: entry_pricing).

price_side.title: Price Side
price_side.description: Which order-book side to use: ask, bid, same, other.

use_order_book.title: Use Order Book
use_order_book.description: Use order-book for exit price calculation.

order_book_top.title: Order Book Top
order_book_top.description: Top N levels of the order book to consider.

price_last_balance.title: Price Last Balance
price_last_balance.description: Interpolation ratio between order-book and last price.

ExitPricingConfig.title: ExitPricingConfig
ExitPricingConfig.description: Controls how the bot picks the exit price (freqtrade: exit_pricing).

test_size.title: Test Size
test_size.description: Fraction of data to use for testing instead of training.

shuffle.title: Shuffle
shuffle.description: Shuffle training data points. Typically False for time-series. Default: False.

include_timeframes.title: Include Timeframes
include_timeframes.description: List of timeframes for which all indicators will be created.

include_corr_pairlist.title: Include Corr Pairlist
include_corr_pairlist.description: List of correlated pairs to add as additional features.

label_period_candles.title: Label Period Candles
label_period_candles.description: Number of candles into the future for which labels are created.

include_shifted_candles.title: Include Shifted Candles
include_shifted_candles.description: Add features from N previous candles to provide historical context.

weight_factor.title: Weight Factor
weight_factor.description: Weight training data points by recency (typically < 1).

indicator_periods_candles.title: Indicator Periods Candles
indicator_periods_candles.description: Time periods to calculate indicators for.

principal_component_analysis.title: Principal Component Analysis
principal_component_analysis.description: Use PCA to reduce dimensionality of the dataset. Default: False.

plot_feature_importances.title: Plot Feature Importances
plot_feature_importances.description: Number of top/bottom features to plot. 0 = disabled. Default: 0.

DI_threshold.title: Di Threshold
DI_threshold.description: Dissimilarity Index threshold for outlier detection. 0 = disabled.

use_SVM_to_remove_outliers.title: Use Svm To Remove Outliers
use_SVM_to_remove_outliers.description: Use Support Vector Machine to detect and remove outliers.

use_DBSCAN_to_remove_outliers.title: Use Dbscan To Remove Outliers
use_DBSCAN_to_remove_outliers.description: Use DBSCAN clustering to identify and remove outliers.

noise_standard_deviation.title: Noise Standard Deviation
noise_standard_deviation.description: Add Gaussian noise to features to prevent overfitting. Relative to normalized space [-1, 1].

outlier_protection_percentage.title: Outlier Protection Percentage
outlier_protection_percentage.description: Max percentage of data points that can be removed as outliers. Default: 30.

reverse_train_test_order.title: Reverse Train Test Order
reverse_train_test_order.description: Train on latest data and test on historical data. Default: False.

shuffle_after_split.title: Shuffle After Split
shuffle_after_split.description: Shuffle train and test sets individually after splitting. Default: False.

buffer_train_data_candles.title: Buffer Train Data Candles
buffer_train_data_candles.description: Remove N candles from beginning and end of training data. Default: 0.

n_estimators.title: N Estimators
n_estimators.description: Number of boosted trees to fit (for tree-based models).

max_depth.title: Max Depth
max_depth.description: Maximum tree depth for tree-based models (LightGBM, XGBoost, CatBoost). -1 = unlimited.

n_jobs.title: N Jobs
n_jobs.description: Number of parallel threads for processing.

thread_count.title: Thread Count
thread_count.description: Number of threads (alternative name for n_jobs in some libraries).

model_kwargs.title: Model Kwargs
model_kwargs.description: Parameters passed to the PyTorch model class.

trainer_kwargs.title: Trainer Kwargs
trainer_kwargs.description: Parameters passed to the PyTorch trainer (n_epochs, batch_size, etc.).

additional_params.title: Additional Params
additional_params.description: Additional model-specific parameters from the model library.

train_cycles.title: Train Cycles
train_cycles.description: Training iterations = train_cycles * number of training data points.

max_trade_duration_candles.title: Max Trade Duration Candles
max_trade_duration_candles.description: Guide agent training to keep trades below desired length.

model_type.title: Model Type
model_type.description: Reinforcement learning model type from stable_baselines3.

max_training_drawdown_pct.title: Max Training Drawdown Pct
max_training_drawdown_pct.description: Maximum drawdown allowed during agent training. Default: 0.8.

cpu_count.title: Cpu Count
cpu_count.description: Number of CPUs to dedicate to RL training.

model_reward_parameters.title: Model Reward Parameters
model_reward_parameters.description: Parameters for the customizable calculate_reward() function.

add_state_info.title: Add State Info
add_state_info.description: Include state info (trade duration, profit, position) in features. Default: False.

randomize_starting_position.title: Randomize Starting Position
randomize_starting_position.description: Randomize episode starting point to avoid overfitting. Default: False.

drop_ohlc_from_features.title: Drop Ohlc From Features
drop_ohlc_from_features.description: Exclude normalized OHLC from feature set. Default: False.

progress_bar.title: Progress Bar
progress_bar.description: Display training progress bar. Default: False.

type.title: Type
type.description: Event type: buy, sell, buy_cancel, sell_cancel, protection_trigger

profit_amount.title: Profit Amount
profit_amount.description: Alias for profit_abs (Freqtrade uses this name)

pairs.title: Pairs
pairs.description: Freqtrade futures pairs e.g. BTC/USDC:USDC; max HL_SYNC_MAX_PAIRS

HyperliquidIngestTriggerRequest.title: HyperliquidIngestTriggerRequest
HyperliquidIngestTriggerRequest.description: Optional override list; when empty, env-based resolution is used.

name.title: Name
name.description: Indicator function name, e.g. RSI, MACD, SUPERTREND.

type.title: Type
type.description: Library that provides this indicator: 'talib' or 'pandas_ta'.

output.title: Output
output.description: Column to select when a TA-Lib function returns multiple outputs, e.g. 'real', 'upperband'. Leave None for pandas_ta and single-output TA-Lib indicators.

parameters.description: Optional parameters forwarded to the indicator function.

pandas_ta_func.title: Pandas Ta Func
pandas_ta_func.description: pandas_ta accessor name when type='pandas_ta', e.g. 'supertrend'.

requires_datetime_index.title: Requires Datetime Index
requires_datetime_index.description: Set True for pandas_ta indicators that require a DatetimeIndex (e.g. VWAP).

timeframe.title: Timeframe
timeframe.description: Optional informative timeframe for this indicator (e.g. '1h', '4h').             If specified, the indicator is computed on this timeframe instead of the primary timeframe.

IndicatorItem.title: IndicatorItem
IndicatorItem.description: Single technical indicator used in signals or FreqAI features.

IndicatorParameter.title: IndicatorParameter
IndicatorParameter.description: Key-value parameters passed to a TA-Lib function.

OrderTimeInForceConfig.title: OrderTimeInForceConfig
OrderTimeInForceConfig.description: Time-in-force settings for entry and exit orders (freqtrade: order_time_in_force).

order_info.title: Order Info
order_info.description: Full order details from client (flexible JSON)

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: User ID (optional, will use current user)

trade_id.title: Trade Id
trade_id.description: Freqtrade internal trade ID — used to link bot webhook events

OrderTrackingCreate.title: OrderTrackingCreate
OrderTrackingCreate.description: Schema for creating an order tracking record

OrderTrackingUpdate.title: OrderTrackingUpdate
OrderTrackingUpdate.description: Schema for updating an order tracking record

entry.title: Entry
entry.description: Order type for entries: limit or market.

exit.title: Exit
exit.description: Order type for exits: limit or market.

stoploss_on_exchange.title: Stoploss On Exchange
stoploss_on_exchange.description: Whether to place the stop-loss directly on the exchange.

force_exit.title: Force Exit
force_exit.description: Order type for force-exit. Defaults to exit order type.

emergency_exit.title: Emergency Exit
emergency_exit.description: Order type used as last resort on emergency exit.

stoploss_on_exchange_limit_ratio.title: Stoploss On Exchange Limit Ratio
stoploss_on_exchange_limit_ratio.description: Limit-order ratio offset from current price when placing SL on exchange.

OrderTypesConfig.title: OrderTypesConfig
OrderTypesConfig.description: Maps trade actions to order types (freqtrade: order_types).

method.title: Method
method.description: Pairlist method to use, e.g. StaticPairList or VolumePairList.

config.title: Config
config.description: Method-specific configuration (e.g. number_assets, sort_key for VolumePairList).

minutes.title: Minutes
minutes.description: Minutes elapsed since trade open at which this ROI target activates.

roi.title: Roi
roi.description: Minimum profit ratio (0–1) required to exit at this step, e.g. 0.04 for 4%.

ROIStep.title: ROIStep
ROIStep.description: Single entry in the minimal_roi ladder.

stoploss.title: Stoploss
stoploss.description: Stop-loss ratio as a negative number, e.g. -0.10 for 10% loss. Exclusive maximum of 0. This value is compiled into the strategy class but can be overridden by the bot config.

trailing_stop_positive.title: Trailing Stop Positive
trailing_stop_positive.description: Trailing stop offset once in profit (0–1, must be > 0). E.g. 0.02 activates a tighter 2% trailing stop. Freqtrade requires this to be non-zero to avoid problems with sell orders.

trailing_stop_positive_offset.title: Trailing Stop Positive Offset
trailing_stop_positive_offset.description: Minimum profit ratio required before trailing_stop_positive activates (must be > 0). Must be greater than trailing_stop_positive.

trailing_only_offset_is_reached.title: Trailing Only Offset Is Reached
trailing_only_offset_is_reached.description: When True, the trailing stop only activates after trailing_stop_positive_offset is reached.

RiskConfig.title: RiskConfig
RiskConfig.description: Stop-loss and trailing stop settings embedded in strategy code.

indicators.title: Indicators
indicators.description: Ordered list of indicators to compute in populate_indicators().

entry_long.title: Entry Long
entry_long.description: Condition block (AND/OR tree) that generates long entry signals. Nested structure produced by the UI condition builder.

exit_long.title: Exit Long
exit_long.description: Condition block for long exit signals.

entry_short.title: Entry Short
entry_short.description: Condition block for short entry signals (requires can_short=True).

exit_short.title: Exit Short
exit_short.description: Condition block for short exit signals.

SignalsConfig.title: SignalsConfig
SignalsConfig.description: Entry and exit signal definitions for a statistical / hybrid strategy.

interface_version.title: Interface Version
interface_version.description: Freqtrade IStrategy interface version. Current stable: 3.

strategy_type.title: Strategy Type
strategy_type.description: Determines how the strategy is generated: 'statistical' = rule-based only; 'ai_powered' = FreqAI model only; 'hybrid' = both.

startup_candle_count.title: Startup Candle Count
startup_candle_count.description: Minimum number of historical candles the strategy requires before producing valid signals. Freqtrade will not trade during the warm-up period.

process_only_new_candles.title: Process Only New Candles
process_only_new_candles.description: Run populate_indicators() only when a new candle closes. Disable if you need tick-level processing.

informative_timeframes.title: Informative Timeframes
informative_timeframes.description: Additional timeframes whose OHLCV data is fetched and merged. E.g. ['1h', '4h']. Freqtrade adds columns like close_1h, high_4h.

can_short.title: Can Short
can_short.description: Allow short entries. Requires trading_mode=futures and margin_mode=isolated in the bot config.

risk.description: Stop-loss and trailing-stop settings compiled into the strategy class.

roi_steps.title: Roi Steps
roi_steps.description: Time-based ROI targets. E.g. [{minutes: 0, roi: 0.04}, {minutes: 30, roi: 0.02}]. Defaults to {0: 0.10} when empty.

use_exit_signal.title: Use Exit Signal
use_exit_signal.description: Honor the strategy's exit signals. Set to False to rely on ROI/stoploss only.

exit_profit_only.title: Exit Profit Only
exit_profit_only.description: Ignore exit signals while the trade is at a loss. The bot will only exit via ROI, stop-loss, or trailing stop.

exit_profit_offset.title: Exit Profit Offset
exit_profit_offset.description: Minimum profit fraction required before exit_profit_only allows an exit (e.g. 0.05 = 5%). Only active when exit_profit_only=True.

ignore_roi_if_entry_signal.title: Ignore Roi If Entry Signal
ignore_roi_if_entry_signal.description: Suppress ROI-based exits when a new entry signal is present. Useful for holding winning trades longer.

max_open_trades.title: Max Open Trades
max_open_trades.description: Override bot-level max_open_trades inside the strategy class. Leave None to inherit from the bot config.

signals.description: Entry/exit condition blocks and indicator list for the strategy.

custom_indicator_items.title: Custom Indicator Items
custom_indicator_items.description: OHLCV-derived custom indicators (resistance, support, volume MA, etc.) computed before TA indicators.

informative_ohlcv_items.title: Informative Ohlcv Items
informative_ohlcv_items.description: Informative OHLCV column references used in conditions, e.g. '1h.close'. Safety guards are generated for each.

freqai.description: FreqAI configuration. Only used when strategy_type is 'ai_powered' or 'hybrid'.

custom_exit.description: Custom exit rules (duration, R:R, time-window, partial exits). Generates custom_exit() and/or adjust_trade_position() methods.

leverage.title: Leverage
leverage.description: Default leverage for futures trades. The strategy reads this from the bot config at runtime via self.config.get('leverage', 1.0). Range: ≥ 1.0.

position_adjustment_enable.title: Position Adjustment Enable
position_adjustment_enable.description: Allow additional entry orders per open trade (DCA / pyramid-in). Sets position_adjustment_enable=True in both the strategy class and bot config.

max_entry_position_adjustment.title: Max Entry Position Adjustment
max_entry_position_adjustment.description: Maximum number of additional entry orders per trade. -1 = unlimited. Only applies when position_adjustment_enable=True.

StrategyConfigurations.title: StrategyConfigurations
StrategyConfigurations.description:
All parameters the strategy code-generator reads from `configurations`.
Every field is optional; omitted fields fall back to the generator defaults.

configurations.description: All code-generation parameters. Every field has a safe default; only supply what differs from the default.

bot_id.title: Bot Id
bot_id.description: ID of the bot this strategy draft belongs to

data.title: Data
data.description: Raw JSON form values from the UI

StrategyDraft.title: StrategyDraft
StrategyDraft.description:
Temporary save of strategy configuration from the UI.
Contains the raw form values (unvalidated).

name.title: Name
name.description: New strategy name (must be a valid Python identifier)

configurations.description: Partial or full replacement of the strategy configurations.

StrategyUpdate.title: StrategyUpdate
StrategyUpdate.description:
Patchable fields for an existing strategy.

Note: Renaming is now supported and will update the strategy name in the database,
bot references, and regenerate strategy files with the new name.

quote.title: Quote
quote.description: Quote/settle currency; default from COINS_QUOTE or USDC

SupportedCoinsPutRequest.title: SupportedCoinsPutRequest
SupportedCoinsPutRequest.description: Base symbols (Hyperliquid perps); same universe as env ``COINS``.

authorized_users.title: Authorized Users
authorized_users.description: List of Telegram usernames allowed to control the bot.

allow_custom_messages.title: Allow Custom Messages
allow_custom_messages.description: Allow strategy to send custom Telegram messages.

balance_dust_level.title: Balance Dust Level
balance_dust_level.description: Ignore balances below this threshold in /balance.

reload.title: Reload
reload.description: Append a Reload button to applicable messages.

TelegramConfig.title: TelegramConfig
TelegramConfig.description: Telegram bot integration for trade notifications and control (freqtrade: telegram).

exit_timeout_count.title: Exit Timeout Count
exit_timeout_count.description: Number of retries before giving up on an exit order. 0 = unlimited.

unit.title: Unit
unit.description: Time unit for entry/exit timeout values.

UnfilledTimeoutConfig.title: UnfilledTimeoutConfig
UnfilledTimeoutConfig.description: Timeout thresholds for unfilled orders (freqtrade: unfilledtimeout).

bot_name.title: Bot Name
bot_name.description: Human-readable name for this bot instance.

exchange_name.title: Exchange Name
exchange_name.description: Exchange ID as recognised by CCXT (e.g. binance, bybit, hyperliquid).

exchange.title: Exchange
exchange.description: Legacy full exchange config object. Exchange-specific fields override individual defaults.

strategy_name.title: Strategy Name
strategy_name.description: Class name of the strategy inside user_data/strategies/.

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: True = paper trading only; False = live trading with real funds.

stake_currency.title: Stake Currency
stake_currency.description: Quote currency used for all trades (e.g. USDT, USDC).

stake_amount.title: Stake Amount
stake_amount.description: Amount of stake_currency per trade, or 'unlimited' to use the full available balance split evenly across max_open_trades.

max_open_trades.title: Max Open Trades
max_open_trades.description: Maximum number of simultaneously open trades. -1 = unlimited.

timeframe.title: Timeframe
timeframe.description: Candle timeframe the strategy operates on.

pair.title: Pair
pair.description: Single trading pair in BASE/QUOTE format (e.g. BTC/USDT). Converted to a list internally.

dry_run_wallet.title: Dry Run Wallet
dry_run_wallet.description: Simulated wallet balance used in dry-run mode. Default: 1000.

fiat_display_currency.title: Fiat Display Currency
fiat_display_currency.description: Fiat currency used to display profit/loss values. Default: USD.

stoploss.title: Stoploss
stoploss.description: Stop-loss ratio as a negative number, e.g. -0.10 for 10% loss. Exclusive maximum of 0. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_stop.title: Trailing Stop
trailing_stop.description: Enable trailing stop-loss. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_stop_positive.title: Trailing Stop Positive
trailing_stop_positive.description: Trailing stop offset once in profit (0–1). E.g. 0.02 activates a tighter 2% trailing stop. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_stop_positive_offset.title: Trailing Stop Positive Offset
trailing_stop_positive_offset.description: Minimum profit ratio required before trailing_stop_positive activates. Usually defined in the strategy.

trailing_only_offset_is_reached.title: Trailing Only Offset Is Reached
trailing_only_offset_is_reached.description: When True, the trailing stop only activates after trailing_stop_positive_offset is reached. Usually defined in the strategy.

minimal_roi.title: Minimal Roi
minimal_roi.description: Minimum ROI targets keyed by minutes elapsed, e.g. {"0": 0.10, "30": 0.05, "60": 0.01}. Usually defined in the strategy.

use_exit_signal.title: Use Exit Signal
use_exit_signal.description: Use the strategy's exit signal. Usually defined in the strategy.

exit_profit_only.title: Exit Profit Only
exit_profit_only.description: Ignore exit signals while the trade is at a loss. Usually defined in the strategy.

exit_profit_offset.title: Exit Profit Offset
exit_profit_offset.description: Minimum profit ratio required before an exit signal is acted upon (requires exit_profit_only=True). Usually defined in the strategy.

ignore_roi_if_entry_signal.title: Ignore Roi If Entry Signal
ignore_roi_if_entry_signal.description: Don't exit based on ROI while a new entry signal is present. Usually defined in the strategy.

ignore_buying_expired_candle_after.title: Ignore Buying Expired Candle After
ignore_buying_expired_candle_after.description: Seconds after a candle close during which a stale entry signal is ignored. Usually defined in the strategy.

trading_mode.title: Trading Mode
trading_mode.description: Market type: spot, margin, or futures. Default: spot.

margin_mode.title: Margin Mode
margin_mode.description: Required when trading_mode=futures or trading_mode=margin. Values: cross, isolated.

liquidation_buffer.title: Liquidation Buffer
liquidation_buffer.description: Safety buffer ratio away from liquidation price (futures only). Range: 0.0–1.0.

leverage.title: Leverage
leverage.description: Leverage multiplier for futures/margin trading (1–125). Default: 1. Futures only.

can_short.title: Can Short
can_short.description: Allow short positions in futures trading. Default: True for futures, False for spot.

position_adjustment_enable.title: Position Adjustment Enable
position_adjustment_enable.description: Enable position adjustment (dollar-cost averaging). Usually defined in the strategy.

max_entry_position_adjustment.title: Max Entry Position Adjustment
max_entry_position_adjustment.description: Maximum number of additional entries per trade. -1 for unlimited. Usually defined in the strategy.

cancel_open_orders_on_exit.title: Cancel Open Orders On Exit
cancel_open_orders_on_exit.description: Cancel all open orders when the bot is stopped. Default: False.

process_only_new_candles.title: Process Only New Candles
process_only_new_candles.description: Run the strategy only on new candles (skip already-seen candles). Saves CPU on slow strategies.

force_entry_enable.title: Force Entry Enable
force_entry_enable.description: Allow force-entry via Telegram or API.

unfilledtimeout.description: Cancel unfilled entry/exit orders after the specified timeout.

entry_pricing.description: Entry price selection strategy (order-book vs last price).

exit_pricing.description: Exit price selection strategy (order-book vs last price).

order_types.description: Map trade actions (entry, exit, stoploss) to order types. Usually defined in the strategy.

order_time_in_force.description: Time-in-force for entry and exit orders. Usually defined in the strategy.

telegram.description: Telegram bot integration for trade notifications and control.

freqai.description: FreqAI machine learning configuration. Enables automated training and retraining of ML models for market prediction based on custom indicators and features.

process_throttle_secs.title: Process Throttle Secs
process_throttle_secs.description: Minimum seconds per bot iteration loop. Increase to reduce CPU usage.

strategy_description.title: Strategy Description
strategy_description.description: Optional human-readable description for the strategy.

configurations.description: Strategy code-generation parameters. Every field has a safe default; only supply what differs from the default.

UnifiedBotStrategyCreate.title: UnifiedBotStrategyCreate
UnifiedBotStrategyCreate.description:
Unified request schema for creating both a bot and a strategy in one atomic API call.

Inherits all bot configuration fields from BotCreateUI (bot_name, exchange_name,
strategy_name, dry_run, stake_currency, stake_amount, max_open_trades, timeframe,
pair, and optional fields).

Adds strategy-specific fields: description, strategy_type, configurations, ai_powered.

Note: ``strategy_name`` (from BotCreateUI) is used as both:
- The name of the Freqtrade strategy class to run (bot config)
- The name of the created Strategies database record

Example::

    POST /bot-strategy/create
    {
        "bot_name": "my_bot",
        "exchange_name": "binance",
        "strategy_name": "MyRSIStrategy",
        "dry_run": true,
        "stake_currency": "USDT",
        "stake_amount": 10,
        "max_open_trades": 3,
        "timeframe": "5m",
        "pair": "BTC/USDT",
        "strategy_description": "RSI-based mean reversion",
        "strategy_type": "statistical",
        "configurations": { ... }
    }

strategy_name.title: Strategy Name
strategy_name.description: New strategy name (must be a valid Python identifier).

strategy_configurations.description: Updated strategy configurations. Triggers strategy file regeneration.

optional.title: Optional
optional.description: Additional bot config fields not covered by top-level fields. Simple keys are applied directly to bot config; 'config_overrides' is a nested dict that is deep-merged into bot config. 'telegram', 'discord', 'webhook', 'freqai' are merged into their respective sections.

UnifiedBotStrategyUpdate.title: UnifiedBotStrategyUpdate
UnifiedBotStrategyUpdate.description:
Request schema for atomically updating bot config and/or strategy in one call.

Both sections are optional — omit a section to leave it unchanged.

The ``strategy_configurations`` field, if provided, triggers strategy file
regeneration and syncs relevant settings (risk, position_adjustment, etc.)
back to the bot's config.json.

retries.title: Retries
retries.description: Number of retries on failure. Default: 0.

WebhookConfig.title: WebhookConfig
WebhookConfig.description: Generic HTTP webhook integration for trade notifications (freqtrade: webhook).

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable or disable FreqAI. Required when freqai config is present.

train_period_days.title: Train Period Days
train_period_days.description: Number of days for training data (width of sliding window). Required when enabled=True.

backtest_period_days.title: Backtest Period Days
backtest_period_days.description: Days to inference before retraining during backtesting. Required when enabled=True.

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: Unique ID for the model. Allows reloading pre-trained models. Required when enabled=True.

freqaimodel.title: Freqaimodel
freqaimodel.description: ML model type to use, e.g. LightGBMRegressor, XGBoostClassifier, CatboostRegressor, etc. Required when enabled=True.

feature_parameters.description: Feature engineering parameters. Required when enabled=True.

live_retrain_hours.title: Live Retrain Hours
live_retrain_hours.description: Frequency of retraining in live/dry runs. 0 = retrain as often as possible. Default: 0.

expiration_hours.title: Expiration Hours
expiration_hours.description: Avoid predictions from models older than N hours. 0 = never expire. Default: 0.

purge_old_models.title: Purge Old Models
purge_old_models.description: Number of models to keep on disk. 0 = keep all, 2 = keep latest 2. Default: 2.

save_backtest_models.title: Save Backtest Models
save_backtest_models.description: Save models to disk during backtesting. Default: False.

fit_live_predictions_candles.title: Fit Live Predictions Candles
fit_live_predictions_candles.description: Number of historical prediction candles for computing label statistics.

continual_learning.title: Continual Learning
continual_learning.description: Use final state of last model as starting point for new model. Default: False.

write_metrics_to_disk.title: Write Metrics To Disk
write_metrics_to_disk.description: Collect and write train/inference timings and CPU usage to JSON. Default: False.

data_kitchen_thread_count.title: Data Kitchen Thread Count
data_kitchen_thread_count.description: Number of threads for data processing. Default: max threads - 2.

activate_tensorboard.title: Activate Tensorboard
activate_tensorboard.description: Enable Tensorboard for compatible models (RL, XGBoost, CatBoost, PyTorch). Default: True.

wait_for_training_iteration_on_reload.title: Wait For Training Iteration On Reload
wait_for_training_iteration_on_reload.description: Wait for current training iteration to finish on reload/shutdown. Default: True.

keras.title: Keras
keras.description: Set to True for Keras/TensorFlow-based models. Default: False.

conv_width.title: Conv Width
conv_width.description: Width of neural network input tensor for historical data. Default: 2.

reduce_df_footprint.title: Reduce Df Footprint
reduce_df_footprint.description: Recast numeric columns to float32/int32 to reduce RAM/disk usage. Default: False.

override_exchange_check.title: Override Exchange Check
override_exchange_check.description: Force FreqAI to use exchanges with insufficient historical data. Default: False.

app__schemas__bot_create__FreqAIConfig.title: FreqAIConfig
app__schemas__bot_create__FreqAIConfig.description:
FreqAI configuration for machine learning-based trading strategies.

FreqAI enables automated training and retraining of ML models to generate
market forecasts based on custom indicators and features.

feature_indicators.title: Feature Indicators
feature_indicators.description: Indicator names to use as ML features. Defaults to all indicators when empty.

target_type.title: Target Type
target_type.description: Prediction task type. 'regression' predicts future return (float); 'classification' predicts direction ('up'/'down').

target_candles.title: Target Candles
target_candles.description: Number of candles ahead to use as the prediction target/label.

app__schemas__strategy__FreqAIConfig.title: FreqAIConfig
app__schemas__strategy__FreqAIConfig.description: FreqAI model training and prediction configuration.
